GitHub Actions workflows for issue locking, pre-commit checks, publishing, and testing.


## Files
- **[lock.yaml](lock.yaml.md)**: Automates locking of inactive closed issues, pull requests, and discussions after 14 days.
- **[pre-commit.yaml](pre-commit.yaml.md)**: GitHub Actions workflow for running pre-commit checks on pull requests and pushes to main and stable branches.
- **[publish.yaml](publish.yaml.md)**: GitHub Actions workflow for building, generating provenance, creating releases, and publishing to PyPI.
- **[tests.yaml](tests.yaml.md)**: GitHub Actions workflow for running tests and type checks on multiple Python versions and operating systems.
